home.title: flour flour BAKERY | Warmth and beauty, every single day
home.description: flour flour BAKERY is a boutique bakery in Tamsui, inspired by riverside sunsets and blossoms — baking a little everyday magic into warmth and beauty.

story.title: Our Story | flour flour BAKERY
story.description: Founded in 2024 on the banks of the Tamsui River, flour flour tells a gentle story of sunsets, flowers, and the everyday magic of the baker's craft.

storyTeaser.heading: A story of the river and the blossom
storyTeaser.body: flour flour was born from Tamsui's sunsets and riverbanks, folding longan blossom honey and local flavours into every ferment. We believe even a single loaf can carry a little magic and warmth.

infoBar.addressValue: No. 123, Zhongzheng Rd., Tamsui Dist., New Taipei City

sections.title: Where the river begins
sections.body: In 2024, flour flour began with a single light by the Tamsui River. Every evening the sunset turns the old street the colour of honey, and the river breeze carries a hint of salt air mixed with the scent of bread fresh from the oven. We chose to settle here not only for the view, but because the riverbank taught us patience — waiting for the tide, waiting for the dough to rise, waiting for the best light of the day. Starting from one small oven, we set out to bake the everyday rhythm of Tamsui into something tender and true.

sections.title: Blossoms and flour
sections.body: Our brand blossom weaves together the softness of natural flowers, the glow of a Tamsui sunset, the sweetness of longan blossoms, and the curl of a croissant — four elements that are also our promises when we bake. We use local longan blossom honey in place of some refined sugar, so every bite carries a faint honeyed note. Our dough rests through a long, slow, cold ferment, letting wheat and wild yeast talk quietly to one another. Flour and flowers may seem unrelated, but in our hands they grow into the same gentle thing.

sections.title: Everyday magic
sections.body: Every morning at four, the oven light comes on before we do. Our bakers knead, shape, and wait, watching the dough slowly rise and colour in the heat — a small magic that happens daily, yet never grows old. We keep our batches deliberately limited, not to manufacture scarcity, but so that every loaf gets the care, the bake, and the hands it deserves before it reaches yours. Baking a little magic into every day, bringing warmth and beauty — that is the promise we make each morning, to ourselves and to you.

story.quote: Baking a little magic into every day, bringing warmth and beauty.

products.footnote: Daily quantities are limited — reservations by phone are recommended.

orderingItems.question: How do I place an order?
orderingItems.answer: Call us at 02-2621-XXXX during business hours, or message our LINE account @flourflour. We'll confirm a pickup time as soon as possible.

orderingItems.question: Do you ship?
orderingItems.answer: Our shelf-stable pastries (madeleines, dacquoise, chiffon, financiers) can be shipped; breads are pickup-only for now to ensure freshness.

orderingItems.question: Can I place a bulk order?
orderingItems.answer: For wedding favours, corporate gifts and other bulk orders, please call or message us on LINE at least 3 days in advance so we can plan the bake and pickup time.

productItems.question: Storage and shelf life
productItems.answer: Bread is best kept at room temperature and enjoyed the day of purchase or the next day; shelf-stable pastries keep refrigerated for 3–5 days and taste best brought back to room temperature.

productItems.question: Allergen information
productItems.answer: Our products may contain gluten, egg, dairy and nuts. Please ask our staff in store, or let us know when ordering so we can help confirm ingredients.

productItems.question: Do you have vegan options?
productItems.answer: Most of our products currently contain butter, honey and similar ingredients, so we don't yet offer fully vegan options. Please contact us before ordering if you have dietary restrictions.

orderInfo.heading: Ordering Notes
orderInfo.pickupValue: Please collect your order within the agreed time window; uncollected orders may be held or cancelled at our discretion.
orderInfo.cancellationValue: Please cancel at least one day before pickup. Same-day cancellations or no-shows are non-refundable.

contact.addressValue: No. 123, Zhongzheng Rd., Tamsui Dist., New Taipei City (near Tamsui Old Street / riverside)

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.lastUpdated: This policy template was generated by AI. We recommend legal review before launch.

sections.heading: Information We Collect
sections.body: When you contact us through the form on this website, we collect the name, phone number and email address you provide.

sections.heading: Purpose of Collection
sections.body: This information is used solely to respond to your inquiry, confirm order details, and coordinate pickup — never for any other purpose.

sections.heading: Retention Period
sections.body: Your personal data is retained for a reasonable period after your inquiry or order is completed, after which it will be deleted or de-identified as required.

sections.heading: Your Rights
sections.body: You may request to access, copy, supplement, or correct your personal data, or request that we stop collecting, processing or using it, by contacting us below.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: For any questions about your personal data, please email hello@flourflour.com.tw.
